```java
package org.example.migration;

import spoon.Launcher;
import spoon.processing.AbstractProcessor;
import spoon.reflect.code.CtInvocation;
import spoon.reflect.code.CtExpression;
import spoon.reflect.reference.CtTypeReference;
import spoon.reflect.factory.Factory;
import spoon.support.sniper.SniperJavaPrettyPrinter;

/**
 * AUTOMATICALLY GENERATED SPOON REFACTORING SCRIPT
 * 
 * NOTE: The input diff was empty. This script demonstrates a hypothetical refactoring:
 * FROM: widget.setColor(String hex) 
 * TO:   widget.setColor(Color.parse(String hex))
 */
public class WidgetRefactoring {

    public static class ColorProcessor extends AbstractProcessor<CtInvocation<?>> {
        @Override
        public boolean isToBeProcessed(CtInvocation<?> candidate) {
            // 1. Name Check
            if (!"setColor".equals(candidate.getExecutable().getSimpleName())) {
                return false;
            }

            // 2. Argument Count Check
            if (candidate.getArguments().size() != 1) {
                return false;
            }

            // 3. Type Check (Defensive for NoClasspath)
            CtExpression<?> arg = candidate.getArguments().get(0);
            CtTypeReference<?> type = arg.getType();

            // If the argument is already of type 'Color', we skip it.
            // We only process if type is String, null (unknown), or compatible.
            if (type != null && type.getQualifiedName().contains("Color")) {
                return false;
            }
            
            // Optional: Check if argument is likely a String (if type resolution works)
            // If type is null (common in NoClasspath), we assume it might be a candidate and rely on method name/owner.
            if (type != null && !type.getQualifiedName().equals("java.lang.String") && !type.getQualifiedName().equals("<unknown>")) {
                // If we know for sure it's NOT a string (e.g. it's an int), skip.
                return false;
            }

            // 4. Owner Check (Relaxed string matching)
            CtTypeReference<?> owner = candidate.getExecutable().getDeclaringType();
            if (owner != null && !owner.getQualifiedName().contains("Widget") && !owner.getQualifiedName().equals("<unknown>")) {
                return false;
            }
            
            return true;
        }

        @Override
        public void process(CtInvocation<?> invocation) {
            Factory factory = getFactory();
            CtExpression<?> originalArg = invocation.getArguments().get(0);

            // Transformation Strategy: Wrap the original String argument in Color.parse(...)
            
            // 1. Create reference to the new type/helper
            CtTypeReference<?> colorType = factory.Type().createReference("org.example.Color");

            // 2. Create the wrapper invocation: Color.parse(originalArg)
            CtInvocation<?> replacement = factory.Code().createInvocation(
                factory.Code().createTypeAccess(colorType),
                factory.Method().createReference(
                    colorType, 
                    colorType, // Return type of parse matches the Class
                    "parse", 
                    factory.Type().stringType() // Argument type
                ),
                originalArg.clone() // Clone the original expression to move it
            );

            // 3. Apply replacement
            originalArg.replace(replacement);
            
            System.out.println("Refactored setColor at " + 
                (invocation.getPosition().isValidPosition() ? invocation.getPosition().getLine() : "unknown line"));
        }
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        // Default paths (editable by user)
        String inputPath = "./src/main/java";
        String outputPath = "./src/main/gen";

        Launcher launcher = new Launcher();
        launcher.addInputResource(inputPath);
        launcher.setSourceOutputDirectory(outputPath);

        // CRITICAL SETTINGS FOR PRESERVATION
        // 1. Enable comments to prevent loss during parsing
        launcher.getEnvironment().setCommentEnabled(true);
        
        // 2. Force Sniper Printer manually to preserve formatting of untouched code
        launcher.getEnvironment().setPrettyPrinterCreator(
            () -> new SniperJavaPrettyPrinter(launcher.getEnvironment())
        );
        
        // 3. NoClasspath mode to allow running without full dependency resolution
        launcher.getEnvironment().setNoClasspath(true);

        launcher.addProcessor(new ColorProcessor());
        
        try { 
            launcher.run(); 
            System.out.println("Refactoring complete. Output in: " + outputPath);
        } catch (Exception e) { 
            e.printStackTrace(); 
        }
    }
}
```
